MULTIMADNESS-TREACHERY_POWER.description:
At the end of your turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]strength[/gold]. 
Deal [red]6[/red] damage to all ALLIES.
MULTIMADNESS-TREACHERY_POWER.smartDescri:
At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]strength[/gold], 
Deal [red]{AllyDamage}[/red] damage to all ALLIES.
MULTIMADNESS-TREACHERY_POWER.title: Treachery
MULTIMADNESS-LUCIDITY_POWER.description: Whenever you take damage on your turn, give all allies that much block

MULTIMADNESS-LUCIDITY_POWER.title: Lucid
MULTIMADNESS-COMPETITION_POWER.descripti: At the end of your turn, if you had the least block gain 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold], if you dealt the least damage gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold]

MULTIMADNESS-COMPETITION_POWER.title: Catch Up!

MULTIMADNESS-TAXATION_POWER.description: Every two energy gained by an ally, gain 1 energy
